title: rothmannia fischeri subsp. fischeri
intro: Rothmannia fischeri subsp. fischeri, also known as the Red Salacia, is a plant species within the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Rothmannia fischeri subsp. fischeri include its use in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of malaria. Herbal preparations of Rothmannia fischeri subsp. fischeri involve the use of its leaves and bark, often in the form of infusions or decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
